{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Rat|kanji=甲子|romaji=kinoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=jiǎzǐ|w=chia-tzŭ|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ tsz̩²¹|y=gaap6 zi2|j=gaap6 zi2|ci=kaːp̚ tsiː²|mc=kæp t͡siʰ|oc-bs=kaːp tsəʔ}} {{more footnotes needed|date=July 2022}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]][[ja:Wood Rat]][[en:Wood Rat]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]][[Category:qq 7]] [[Category:qq--qq]] [[en:Yang Wood Rat]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]]{{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:attempting to force refresh]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 甲子'''（きのえね、こうし、かっし<ref>{{Cite web|和書|title=甲子 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E7%94%B2%E5%AD%90-464293 |access-date=2022-10-04 |publisher=精選版 日本国語大辞典}}</ref>）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの1番目で、前は[[癸亥]]、次は[[乙丑]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[子 (十二支)|子]]は陽の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。
==甲子年==
* [[西暦]]年を60で割って4が余る年が甲子[[年]]となる。
* [[王朝]]交代の[[革命]]年である[[辛酉]]年の4年後で、[[天命]]が改まり、徳を備えた人に天命が下される革令年、変乱の多い年とされ、「'''甲子革令'''」という。日本の平安時代以降、それを防ぐ目的で甲子年には[[改元]]が行われた。[[1024年]]の甲子改元以降で、明治時代（[[一世一元の詔]]により在位中の改元が廃止）より前に甲子改元が無かったのは[[永禄]]7年（[[1564年]]）のみである<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>。 * [[桓武天皇]]は同母兄弟の[[天智天皇|天智]]系の王子（[[弘文天皇|大友皇子]]）を殺害して即位した[[天武天皇|天武]]系王統の断絶後に即位した父であり、天智系の[[光仁天皇]]から皇位を継承したことから、王統交代を強く意識し、革令の年である[[784年]]に[[長岡京]]に遷都したともいわれている。 * [[184年]]に中国[[後漢]]の末期に起こり、漢の解体を決定付けた[[黄巾の乱]]は「{{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}（『[[後漢書]]』71巻 皇甫嵩朱鑈列傳 第61 [[皇甫嵩]]伝<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>）」をスローガンに掲げた。 * [[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝期]]の[[1384年]]に[[陸奥国|陸奥]]国で発見された温泉は、甲子年にちなんで[[甲子温泉]]と名付けられた。 * [[元治]]元年（[[1864年]]）の甲子年にあやかり、伊東大蔵（大藏）は[[伊東甲子太郎]]に改名した。 * [[大正]]13年（[[1924年]]）に[[兵庫県]][[西宮市]]に作られた野球場は、この年のSexagenary cycle comprehensiveから「甲子園大運動場」（現 [[阪神甲子園球場]]）と命名された<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120529015859/http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm|title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅|work=[[読売新聞]]|date=2011-07-06|accessdate=2013-12-31}}</ref>。これは[[甲子園 (地名)|西宮市内の地名]]にもなっている。また、[[東京甲子社]]はこの年に前身である「甲子会」が結成されたのが社名の由来である。
{| class="wikitable" |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- style="vertical-align:top;" | *[[4年]] *[[64年]] *[[124年]] *[[184年]] *[[244年]] *[[304年]] *[[364年]] *[[424年]] *[[484年]] *[[544年]] *[[604年]] *[[664年]] *[[724年]] *[[784年]] *[[844年]] *[[904年]] *[[964年]] | *[[1024年]] *[[1084年]] *[[1144年]] *[[1204年]] *[[1264年]] *[[1324年]] *[[1384年]] *[[1444年]] *[[1504年]] *[[1564年]] *[[1624年]] *[[1684年]] *[[1744年]] *[[1804年]] *[[1864年]] *[[1924年]] *[[1984年]] | *[[2044年]] *[[2104年]] *[[2164年]] *[[2224年]] *[[2284年]] *[[2344年]] *[[2404年]] *[[2464年]] *[[2524年]] *[[2584年]] *[[2644年]] *[[2704年]] *[[2764年]] *[[2824年]] *[[2884年]] *[[2944年]] |}
==甲子月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[11月]]が甲子の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ここでいう月は[[旧暦]]月や[[節月]]（[[大雪]]から[[小寒]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲子日== 甲が木性、子が水性で相生（水生木）の関係にあり、Sexagenary cycleの組合せの1番目であることから甲子日は[[吉日]]とされている。
子を[[ネズミ|鼠]]と結び付かせ、鼠を[[大黒天]]の使者とみなして大黒天祭（甲子祭）が行われる。甲子待（かっしまち）と言って、子の刻まで起きて[[大豆]]・[[黒豆]]・[[二股大根]]を供え、大黒天を祀る。
[[松浦清|松浦静山]]の随筆集『[[甲子夜話]]』は[[1821年]]（文政6年）11月17日の甲子日に書き始めたことより命名された。
===甲子日の暦注下段=== *[[凶会日]]（[[旧暦]]3月の場合） *[[神吉日]] *[[大明日]]
== 甲子を含む人名 == * [[板見甲子夫]]（かねお）- 1924年生、教育者。 * [[伊東甲子太郎]]（かしたろう） * [[桑原甲子雄]]（きねお） * [[瀧澤甲子彦]]（かしお）- 1924年生、フィギュアスケート選手。 * [[長島甲子男]]（きねお）- 1924年生、プロ野球選手。 * [[福田甲子雄]]（きねお） * [[増田甲子七]]（かねしち） * [[三浦甲子二]]（きねじ）- 1924年生、ジャーナリスト。
== See Also == *[[還暦]] *[[甲子村]]（かっしむら、[[岩手県]][[上閉伊郡]]にあった村） *[[キノエネ醤油]] *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}}

==甲子年==
* [[西暦]]年を60で割って4が余る年が甲子[[年]]となる。
* [[王朝]]交代の[[革命]]年である[[辛酉]]年の4年後で、[[天命]]が改まり、徳を備えた人に天命が下される革令年、変乱の多い年とされ、「'''甲子革令'''」という。日本の平安時代以降、それを防ぐ目的で甲子年には[[改元]]が行われた。[[1024年]]の甲子改元以降で、明治時代（[[一世一元の詔]]により在位中の改元が廃止）より前に甲子改元が無かったのは[[永禄]]7年（[[1564年]]）のみである<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>。 * [[桓武天皇]]は同母兄弟の[[天智天皇|天智]]系の王子（[[弘文天皇|大友皇子]]）を殺害して即位した[[天武天皇|天武]]系王統の断絶後に即位した父であり、天智系の[[光仁天皇]]から皇位を継承したことから、王統交代を強く意識し、革令の年である[[784年]]に[[長岡京]]に遷都したともいわれている。 * [[184年]]に中国[[後漢]]の末期に起こり、漢の解体を決定付けた[[黄巾の乱]]は「{{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}（『[[後漢書]]』71巻 皇甫嵩朱鑈列傳 第61 [[皇甫嵩]]伝<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>）」をスローガンに掲げた。 * [[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝期]]の[[1384年]]に[[陸奥国|陸奥]]国で発見された温泉は、甲子年にちなんで[[甲子温泉]]と名付けられた。 * [[元治]]元年（[[1864年]]）の甲子年にあやかり、伊東大蔵（大藏）は[[伊東甲子太郎]]に改名した。 * [[大正]]13年（[[1924年]]）に[[兵庫県]][[西宮市]]に作られた野球場は、この年のSexagenary cycle comprehensiveから「甲子園大運動場」（現 [[阪神甲子園球場]]）と命名された<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120529015859/http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm|title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅|work=[[読売新聞]]|date=2011-07-06|accessdate=2013-12-31}}</ref>。これは[[甲子園 (地名)|西宮市内の地名]]にもなっている。また、[[東京甲子社]]はこの年に前身である「甲子会」が結成されたのが社名の由来である。

==甲子月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[11月]]が甲子の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ここでいう月は[[旧暦]]月や[[節月]]（[[大雪]]から[[小寒]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲子日== 甲が木性、子が水性で相生（水生木）の関係にあり、Sexagenary cycleの組合せの1番目であることから甲子日は[[吉日]]とされている。
子を[[ネズミ|鼠]]と結び付かせ、鼠を[[大黒天]]の使者とみなして大黒天祭（甲子祭）が行われる。甲子待（かっしまち）と言って、子の刻まで起きて[[大豆]]・[[黒豆]]・[[二股大根]]を供え、大黒天を祀る。
[[松浦清|松浦静山]]の随筆集『[[甲子夜話]]』は[[1821年]]（文政6年）11月17日の甲子日に書き始めたことより命名された。
===甲子日の暦注下段=== *[[凶会日]]（[[旧暦]]3月の場合） *[[神吉日]] *[[大明日]]
== 甲子を含む人名 == * [[板見甲子夫]]（かねお）- 1924年生、教育者。 * [[伊東甲子太郎]]（かしたろう） * [[桑原甲子雄]]（きねお） * [[瀧澤甲子彦]]（かしお）- 1924年生、フィギュアスケート選手。 * [[長島甲子男]]（きねお）- 1924年生、プロ野球選手。 * [[福田甲子雄]]（きねお） * [[増田甲子七]]（かねしち） * [[三浦甲子二]]（きねじ）- 1924年生、ジャーナリスト。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Rat|kanji=甲子|romaji=kinoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=jiǎzǐ|w=chia-tzŭ|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ tsz̩²¹|y=gaap6 zi2|j=gaap6 zi2|ci=kaːp̚ tsiː²|mc=kæp t͡siʰ|oc-bs=kaːp tsəʔ}} {{more footnotes needed|date=July 2022}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]][[ja:Wood Rat]][[en:Wood Rat]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]][[Category:qq 7]] [[Category:qq--qq]] [[en:Yang Wood Rat]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]]{{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:attempting to force refresh]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 甲子'''（きのえね、こうし、かっし<ref>{{Cite web|和書|title=甲子 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E7%94%B2%E5%AD%90-464293 |access-date=2022-10-04 |publisher=精選版 日本国語大辞典}}</ref>）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの1番目で、前は[[癸亥]]、次は[[乙丑]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[子 (十二支)|子]]は陽の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。
==甲子年==
* [[西暦]]年を60で割って4が余る年が甲子[[年]]となる。
* [[王朝]]交代の[[革命]]年である[[辛酉]]年の4年後で、[[天命]]が改まり、徳を備えた人に天命が下される革令年、変乱の多い年とされ、「'''甲子革令'''」という。日本の平安時代以降、それを防ぐ目的で甲子年には[[改元]]が行われた。[[1024年]]の甲子改元以降で、明治時代（[[一世一元の詔]]により在位中の改元が廃止）より前に甲子改元が無かったのは[[永禄]]7年（[[1564年]]）のみである<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>。 * [[桓武天皇]]は同母兄弟の[[天智天皇|天智]]系の王子（[[弘文天皇|大友皇子]]）を殺害して即位した[[天武天皇|天武]]系王統の断絶後に即位した父であり、天智系の[[光仁天皇]]から皇位を継承したことから、王統交代を強く意識し、革令の年である[[784年]]に[[長岡京]]に遷都したともいわれている。 * [[184年]]に中国[[後漢]]の末期に起こり、漢の解体を決定付けた[[黄巾の乱]]は「{{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}（『[[後漢書]]』71巻 皇甫嵩朱鑈列傳 第61 [[皇甫嵩]]伝<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>）」をスローガンに掲げた。 * [[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝期]]の[[1384年]]に[[陸奥国|陸奥]]国で発見された温泉は、甲子年にちなんで[[甲子温泉]]と名付けられた。 * [[元治]]元年（[[1864年]]）の甲子年にあやかり、伊東大蔵（大藏）は[[伊東甲子太郎]]に改名した。 * [[大正]]13年（[[1924年]]）に[[兵庫県]][[西宮市]]に作られた野球場は、この年のSexagenary cycle comprehensiveから「甲子園大運動場」（現 [[阪神甲子園球場]]）と命名された<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120529015859/http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm|title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅|work=[[読売新聞]]|date=2011-07-06|accessdate=2013-12-31}}</ref>。これは[[甲子園 (地名)|西宮市内の地名]]にもなっている。また、[[東京甲子社]]はこの年に前身である「甲子会」が結成されたのが社名の由来である。

==甲子月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[11月]]が甲子の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ここでいう月は[[旧暦]]月や[[節月]]（[[大雪]]から[[小寒]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲子日== 甲が木性、子が水性で相生（水生木）の関係にあり、Sexagenary cycleの組合せの1番目であることから甲子日は[[吉日]]とされている。
子を[[ネズミ|鼠]]と結び付かせ、鼠を[[大黒天]]の使者とみなして大黒天祭（甲子祭）が行われる。甲子待（かっしまち）と言って、子の刻まで起きて[[大豆]]・[[黒豆]]・[[二股大根]]を供え、大黒天を祀る。
[[松浦清|松浦静山]]の随筆集『[[甲子夜話]]』は[[1821年]]（文政6年）11月17日の甲子日に書き始めたことより命名された。

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]][[ja:Wood Rat]][[en:Wood Rat]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]][[Category:qq 7]] [[Category:qq--qq]] [[en:Yang Wood Rat]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]]{{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:attempting to force refresh]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 甲子'''（きのえね、こうし、かっし<ref>{{Cite web|和書|title=甲子 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E7%94%B2%E5%AD%90-464293 |access-date=2022-10-04 |publisher=精選版 日本国語大辞典}}</ref>）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの1番目で、前は[[癸亥]]、次は[[乙丑]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[子 (十二支)|子]]は陽の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。
==甲子年==
* [[西暦]]年を60で割って4が余る年が甲子[[年]]となる。
* [[王朝]]交代の[[革命]]年である[[辛酉]]年の4年後で、[[天命]]が改まり、徳を備えた人に天命が下される革令年、変乱の多い年とされ、「'''甲子革令'''」という。日本の平安時代以降、それを防ぐ目的で甲子年には[[改元]]が行われた。[[1024年]]の甲子改元以降で、明治時代（[[一世一元の詔]]により在位中の改元が廃止）より前に甲子改元が無かったのは[[永禄]]7年（[[1564年]]）のみである<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>。 * [[桓武天皇]]は同母兄弟の[[天智天皇|天智]]系の王子（[[弘文天皇|大友皇子]]）を殺害して即位した[[天武天皇|天武]]系王統の断絶後に即位した父であり、天智系の[[光仁天皇]]から皇位を継承したことから、王統交代を強く意識し、革令の年である[[784年]]に[[長岡京]]に遷都したともいわれている。 * [[184年]]に中国[[後漢]]の末期に起こり、漢の解体を決定付けた[[黄巾の乱]]は「{{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}（『[[後漢書]]』71巻 皇甫嵩朱鑈列傳 第61 [[皇甫嵩]]伝<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>）」をスローガンに掲げた。 * [[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝期]]の[[1384年]]に[[陸奥国|陸奥]]国で発見された温泉は、甲子年にちなんで[[甲子温泉]]と名付けられた。 * [[元治]]元年（[[1864年]]）の甲子年にあやかり、伊東大蔵（大藏）は[[伊東甲子太郎]]に改名した。 * [[大正]]13年（[[1924年]]）に[[兵庫県]][[西宮市]]に作られた野球場は、この年のSexagenary cycle comprehensiveから「甲子園大運動場」（現 [[阪神甲子園球場]]）と命名された<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120529015859/http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm|title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅|work=[[読売新聞]]|date=2011-07-06|accessdate=2013-12-31}}</ref>。これは[[甲子園 (地名)|西宮市内の地名]]にもなっている。また、[[東京甲子社]]はこの年に前身である「甲子会」が結成されたのが社名の由来である。
{| class="wikitable" |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- style="vertical-align:top;" | *[[4年]] *[[64年]] *[[124年]] *[[184年]] *[[244年]] *[[304年]] *[[364年]] *[[424年]] *[[484年]] *[[544年]] *[[604年]] *[[664年]] *[[724年]] *[[784年]] *[[844年]] *[[904年]] *[[964年]] | *[[1024年]] *[[1084年]] *[[1144年]] *[[1204年]] *[[1264年]] *[[1324年]] *[[1384年]] *[[1444年]] *[[1504年]] *[[1564年]] *[[1624年]] *[[1684年]] *[[1744年]] *[[1804年]] *[[1864年]] *[[1924年]] *[[1984年]] | *[[2044年]] *[[2104年]] *[[2164年]] *[[2224年]] *[[2284年]] *[[2344年]] *[[2404年]] *[[2464年]] *[[2524年]] *[[2584年]] *[[2644年]] *[[2704年]] *[[2764年]] *[[2824年]] *[[2884年]] *[[2944年]] |}
==甲子月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[11月]]が甲子の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ここでいう月は[[旧暦]]月や[[節月]]（[[大雪]]から[[小寒]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲子日== 甲が木性、子が水性で相生（水生木）の関係にあり、Sexagenary cycleの組合せの1番目であることから甲子日は[[吉日]]とされている。
子を[[ネズミ|鼠]]と結び付かせ、鼠を[[大黒天]]の使者とみなして大黒天祭（甲子祭）が行われる。甲子待（かっしまち）と言って、子の刻まで起きて[[大豆]]・[[黒豆]]・[[二股大根]]を供え、大黒天を祀る。
[[松浦清|松浦静山]]の随筆集『[[甲子夜話]]』は[[1821年]]（文政6年）11月17日の甲子日に書き始めたことより命名された。
===甲子日の暦注下段=== *[[凶会日]]（[[旧暦]]3月の場合） *[[神吉日]] *[[大明日]]
== 甲子を含む人名 == * [[板見甲子夫]]（かねお）- 1924年生、教育者。 * [[伊東甲子太郎]]（かしたろう） * [[桑原甲子雄]]（きねお） * [[瀧澤甲子彦]]（かしお）- 1924年生、フィギュアスケート選手。 * [[長島甲子男]]（きねお）- 1924年生、プロ野球選手。 * [[福田甲子雄]]（きねお） * [[増田甲子七]]（かねしち） * [[三浦甲子二]]（きねじ）- 1924年生、ジャーナリスト。

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの1番目で、前は[[癸亥]]、次は[[乙丑]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[子 (十二支)|子]]は陽の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。
==甲子年==
* [[西暦]]年を60で割って4が余る年が甲子[[年]]となる。
* [[王朝]]交代の[[革命]]年である[[辛酉]]年の4年後で、[[天命]]が改まり、徳を備えた人に天命が下される革令年、変乱の多い年とされ、「'''甲子革令'''」という。日本の平安時代以降、それを防ぐ目的で甲子年には[[改元]]が行われた。[[1024年]]の甲子改元以降で、明治時代（[[一世一元の詔]]により在位中の改元が廃止）より前に甲子改元が無かったのは[[永禄]]7年（[[1564年]]）のみである<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>。 * [[桓武天皇]]は同母兄弟の[[天智天皇|天智]]系の王子（[[弘文天皇|大友皇子]]）を殺害して即位した[[天武天皇|天武]]系王統の断絶後に即位した父であり、天智系の[[光仁天皇]]から皇位を継承したことから、王統交代を強く意識し、革令の年である[[784年]]に[[長岡京]]に遷都したともいわれている。 * [[184年]]に中国[[後漢]]の末期に起こり、漢の解体を決定付けた[[黄巾の乱]]は「{{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}（『[[後漢書]]』71巻 皇甫嵩朱鑈列傳 第61 [[皇甫嵩]]伝<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>）」をスローガンに掲げた。 * [[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝期]]の[[1384年]]に[[陸奥国|陸奥]]国で発見された温泉は、甲子年にちなんで[[甲子温泉]]と名付けられた。 * [[元治]]元年（[[1864年]]）の甲子年にあやかり、伊東大蔵（大藏）は[[伊東甲子太郎]]に改名した。 * [[大正]]13年（[[1924年]]）に[[兵庫県]][[西宮市]]に作られた野球場は、この年のSexagenary cycle comprehensiveから「甲子園大運動場」（現 [[阪神甲子園球場]]）と命名された<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120529015859/http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm|title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅|work=[[読売新聞]]|date=2011-07-06|accessdate=2013-12-31}}</ref>。これは[[甲子園 (地名)|西宮市内の地名]]にもなっている。また、[[東京甲子社]]はこの年に前身である「甲子会」が結成されたのが社名の由来である。
{| class="wikitable" |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- style="vertical-align:top;" | *[[4年]] *[[64年]] *[[124年]] *[[184年]] *[[244年]] *[[304年]] *[[364年]] *[[424年]] *[[484年]] *[[544年]] *[[604年]] *[[664年]] *[[724年]] *[[784年]] *[[844年]] *[[904年]] *[[964年]] | *[[1024年]] *[[1084年]] *[[1144年]] *[[1204年]] *[[1264年]] *[[1324年]] *[[1384年]] *[[1444年]] *[[1504年]] *[[1564年]] *[[1624年]] *[[1684年]] *[[1744年]] *[[1804年]] *[[1864年]] *[[1924年]] *[[1984年]] | *[[2044年]] *[[2104年]] *[[2164年]] *[[2224年]] *[[2284年]] *[[2344年]] *[[2404年]] *[[2464年]] *[[2524年]] *[[2584年]] *[[2644年]] *[[2704年]] *[[2764年]] *[[2824年]] *[[2884年]] *[[2944年]] |}
==甲子月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[11月]]が甲子の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ここでいう月は[[旧暦]]月や[[節月]]（[[大雪]]から[[小寒]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲子日== 甲が木性、子が水性で相生（水生木）の関係にあり、Sexagenary cycleの組合せの1番目であることから甲子日は[[吉日]]とされている。
子を[[ネズミ|鼠]]と結び付かせ、鼠を[[大黒天]]の使者とみなして大黒天祭（甲子祭）が行われる。甲子待（かっしまち）と言って、子の刻まで起きて[[大豆]]・[[黒豆]]・[[二股大根]]を供え、大黒天を祀る。
[[松浦清|松浦静山]]の随筆集『[[甲子夜話]]』は[[1821年]]（文政6年）11月17日の甲子日に書き始めたことより命名された。
===甲子日の暦注下段=== *[[凶会日]]（[[旧暦]]3月の場合） *[[神吉日]] *[[大明日]]
== 甲子を含む人名 == * [[板見甲子夫]]（かねお）- 1924年生、教育者。 * [[伊東甲子太郎]]（かしたろう） * [[桑原甲子雄]]（きねお） * [[瀧澤甲子彦]]（かしお）- 1924年生、フィギュアスケート選手。 * [[長島甲子男]]（きねお）- 1924年生、プロ野球選手。 * [[福田甲子雄]]（きねお） * [[増田甲子七]]（かねしち） * [[三浦甲子二]]（きねじ）- 1924年生、ジャーナリスト。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Rat|kanji=甲子|romaji=kinoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=jiǎzǐ|w=chia-tzŭ|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ tsz̩²¹|y=gaap6 zi2|j=gaap6 zi2|ci=kaːp̚ tsiː²|mc=kæp t͡siʰ|oc-bs=kaːp tsəʔ}} {{more footnotes needed|date=July 2022}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]][[ja:Wood Rat]][[en:Wood Rat]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]][[Category:qq 7]] [[Category:qq--qq]] [[en:Yang Wood Rat]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]]{{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:attempting to force refresh]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 甲子'''（きのえね、こうし、かっし<ref>{{Cite web|和書|title=甲子 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E7%94%B2%E5%AD%90-464293 |access-date=2022-10-04 |publisher=精選版 日本国語大辞典}}</ref>）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの1番目で、前は[[癸亥]]、次は[[乙丑]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[子 (十二支)|子]]は陽の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。
==甲子年==
* [[西暦]]年を60で割って4が余る年が甲子[[年]]となる。
* [[王朝]]交代の[[革命]]年である[[辛酉]]年の4年後で、[[天命]]が改まり、徳を備えた人に天命が下される革令年、変乱の多い年とされ、「'''甲子革令'''」という。日本の平安時代以降、それを防ぐ目的で甲子年には[[改元]]が行われた。[[1024年]]の甲子改元以降で、明治時代（[[一世一元の詔]]により在位中の改元が廃止）より前に甲子改元が無かったのは[[永禄]]7年（[[1564年]]）のみである<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>。 * [[桓武天皇]]は同母兄弟の[[天智天皇|天智]]系の王子（[[弘文天皇|大友皇子]]）を殺害して即位した[[天武天皇|天武]]系王統の断絶後に即位した父であり、天智系の[[光仁天皇]]から皇位を継承したことから、王統交代を強く意識し、革令の年である[[784年]]に[[長岡京]]に遷都したともいわれている。 * [[184年]]に中国[[後漢]]の末期に起こり、漢の解体を決定付けた[[黄巾の乱]]は「{{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}（『[[後漢書]]』71巻 皇甫嵩朱鑈列傳 第61 [[皇甫嵩]]伝<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>）」をスローガンに掲げた。 * [[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝期]]の[[1384年]]に[[陸奥国|陸奥]]国で発見された温泉は、甲子年にちなんで[[甲子温泉]]と名付けられた。 * [[元治]]元年（[[1864年]]）の甲子年にあやかり、伊東大蔵（大藏）は[[伊東甲子太郎]]に改名した。 * [[大正]]13年（[[1924年]]）に[[兵庫県]][[西宮市]]に作られた野球場は、この年のSexagenary cycle comprehensiveから「甲子園大運動場」（現 [[阪神甲子園球場]]）と命名された<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120529015859/http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm|title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅|work=[[読売新聞]]|date=2011-07-06|accessdate=2013-12-31}}</ref>。これは[[甲子園 (地名)|西宮市内の地名]]にもなっている。また、[[東京甲子社]]はこの年に前身である「甲子会」が結成されたのが社名の由来である。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Rat|kanji=甲子|romaji=kinoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=jiǎzǐ|w=chia-tzŭ|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ tsz̩²¹|y=gaap6 zi2|j=gaap6 zi2|ci=kaːp̚ tsiː²|mc=kæp t͡siʰ|oc-bs=kaːp tsəʔ}} {{more footnotes needed|date=July 2022}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]][[ja:Wood Rat]][[en:Wood Rat]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]][[Category:qq 7]] [[Category:qq--qq]] [[en:Yang Wood Rat]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]]{{citation needed|Wood Rat}}[[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:attempting to force refresh]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 甲子'''（きのえね、こうし、かっし<ref>{{Cite web|和書|title=甲子 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E7%94%B2%E5%AD%90-464293 |access-date=2022-10-04 |publisher=精選版 日本国語大辞典}}</ref>）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの1番目で、前は[[癸亥]]、次は[[乙丑]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[子 (十二支)|子]]は陽の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（水生木）である。
==甲子年==
* [[西暦]]年を60で割って4が余る年が甲子[[年]]となる。
* [[王朝]]交代の[[革命]]年である[[辛酉]]年の4年後で、[[天命]]が改まり、徳を備えた人に天命が下される革令年、変乱の多い年とされ、「'''甲子革令'''」という。日本の平安時代以降、それを防ぐ目的で甲子年には[[改元]]が行われた。[[1024年]]の甲子改元以降で、明治時代（[[一世一元の詔]]により在位中の改元が廃止）より前に甲子改元が無かったのは[[永禄]]7年（[[1564年]]）のみである<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>。 * [[桓武天皇]]は同母兄弟の[[天智天皇|天智]]系の王子（[[弘文天皇|大友皇子]]）を殺害して即位した[[天武天皇|天武]]系王統の断絶後に即位した父であり、天智系の[[光仁天皇]]から皇位を継承したことから、王統交代を強く意識し、革令の年である[[784年]]に[[長岡京]]に遷都したともいわれている。 * [[184年]]に中国[[後漢]]の末期に起こり、漢の解体を決定付けた[[黄巾の乱]]は「{{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}（『[[後漢書]]』71巻 皇甫嵩朱鑈列傳 第61 [[皇甫嵩]]伝<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>）」をスローガンに掲げた。 * [[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝期]]の[[1384年]]に[[陸奥国|陸奥]]国で発見された温泉は、甲子年にちなんで[[甲子温泉]]と名付けられた。 * [[元治]]元年（[[1864年]]）の甲子年にあやかり、伊東大蔵（大藏）は[[伊東甲子太郎]]に改名した。 * [[大正]]13年（[[1924年]]）に[[兵庫県]][[西宮市]]に作られた野球場は、この年のSexagenary cycle comprehensiveから「甲子園大運動場」（現 [[阪神甲子園球場]]）と命名された<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120529015859/http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm|title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅|work=[[読売新聞]]|date=2011-07-06|accessdate=2013-12-31}}</ref>。これは[[甲子園 (地名)|西宮市内の地名]]にもなっている。また、[[東京甲子社]]はこの年に前身である「甲子会」が結成されたのが社名の由来である。
{| class="wikitable" |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- style="vertical-align:top;" | *[[4年]] *[[64年]] *[[124年]] *[[184年]] *[[244年]] *[[304年]] *[[364年]] *[[424年]] *[[484年]] *[[544年]] *[[604年]] *[[664年]] *[[724年]] *[[784年]] *[[844年]] *[[904年]] *[[964年]] | *[[1024年]] *[[1084年]] *[[1144年]] *[[1204年]] *[[1264年]] *[[1324年]] *[[1384年]] *[[1444年]] *[[1504年]] *[[1564年]] *[[1624年]] *[[1684年]] *[[1744年]] *[[1804年]] *[[1864年]] *[[1924年]] *[[1984年]] | *[[2044年]] *[[2104年]] *[[2164年]] *[[2224年]] *[[2284年]] *[[2344年]] *[[2404年]] *[[2464年]] *[[2524年]] *[[2584年]] *[[2644年]] *[[2704年]] *[[2764年]] *[[2824年]] *[[2884年]] *[[2944年]] |}
==甲子月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[11月]]が甲子の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ここでいう月は[[旧暦]]月や[[節月]]（[[大雪]]から[[小寒]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲子日== 甲が木性、子が水性で相生（水生木）の関係にあり、Sexagenary cycleの組合せの1番目であることから甲子日は[[吉日]]とされている。
子を[[ネズミ|鼠]]と結び付かせ、鼠を[[大黒天]]の使者とみなして大黒天祭（甲子祭）が行われる。甲子待（かっしまち）と言って、子の刻まで起きて[[大豆]]・[[黒豆]]・[[二股大根]]を供え、大黒天を祀る。
[[松浦清|松浦静山]]の随筆集『[[甲子夜話]]』は[[1821年]]（文政6年）11月17日の甲子日に書き始めたことより命名された。
===甲子日の暦注下段=== *[[凶会日]]（[[旧暦]]3月の場合） *[[神吉日]] *[[大明日]]
== 甲子を含む人名 == * [[板見甲子夫]]（かねお）- 1924年生、教育者。 * [[伊東甲子太郎]]（かしたろう） * [[桑原甲子雄]]（きねお） * [[瀧澤甲子彦]]（かしお）- 1924年生、フィギュアスケート選手。 * [[長島甲子男]]（きねお）- 1924年生、プロ野球選手。 * [[福田甲子雄]]（きねお） * [[増田甲子七]]（かねしち） * [[三浦甲子二]]（きねじ）- 1924年生、ジャーナリスト。

In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>

[[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Rat|kanji=甲子|romaji=kinoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=jiǎzǐ|w=chia-tzŭ|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ tsz̩²¹|y=gaap6 zi2|j=gaap6 zi2|ci=kaːp̚ tsiː²|mc=kæp t͡siʰ|oc-bs=kaːp tsəʔ}} {{more footnotes needed|date=July 2022}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.
== See also ==
* [[Hwangap]] * {{In title}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]] [[ja:Wood Rat]] [[en:Wood Rat]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]] [[Category:qq 7]] [[Category:qq--qq]] [[en:Yang Wood Rat]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Rat-qq]] [[Category:Wood Rat]] [[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:attempting to force refresh]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] *
== See Also == *[[還暦]] *[[甲子村]]（かっしむら、[[岩手県]][[上閉伊郡]]にあった村） *[[キノエネ醤油]] *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Rat|kanji=甲子|romaji=kinoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=jiǎzǐ|w=chia-tzŭ|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ tsz̩²¹|y=gaap6 zi2|j=gaap6 zi2|ci=kaːp̚ tsiː²|mc=kæp t͡siʰ|oc-bs=kaːp tsəʔ}} {{more footnotes needed|date=July 2022}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Rat|kanji=甲子|romaji=kinoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=jiǎzǐ|w=chia-tzŭ|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ tsz̩²¹|y=gaap6 zi2|j=gaap6 zi2|ci=kaːp̚ tsiː²|mc=kæp t͡siʰ|oc-bs=kaːp tsəʔ}} {{more footnotes needed|date=July 2022}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Rat|kanji=甲子|romaji=kinoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=jiǎzǐ|w=chia-tzŭ|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ tsz̩²¹|y=gaap6 zi2|j=gaap6 zi2|ci=kaːp̚ tsiː²|mc=kæp t͡siʰ|oc-bs=kaːp tsəʔ}} {{more footnotes needed|date=July 2022}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

[[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Rat|kanji=甲子|romaji=kinoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=jiǎzǐ|w=chia-tzŭ|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ tsz̩²¹|y=gaap6 zi2|j=gaap6 zi2|ci=kaːp̚ tsiː²|mc=kæp t͡siʰ|oc-bs=kaːp tsəʔ}} {{more footnotes needed|date=July 2022}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Rat|kanji=甲子|romaji=kinoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=jiǎzǐ|w=chia-tzŭ|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ tsz̩²¹|y=gaap6 zi2|j=gaap6 zi2|ci=kaːp̚ tsiː²|mc=kæp t͡siʰ|oc-bs=kaːp tsəʔ}} {{more footnotes needed|date=July 2022}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Wood Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Wood Rat''' (甲子) is the first combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].[[ja:甲子]]
== Western calendar years == A year of the Wood Rat occurs every 60 years, in a year that ends in 4, according to the following table: {| class="wikitable" |+Associated years !1st millennium !2nd millennium !3rd millennium !4th millennium |- style="vertical-align:top;" | * 4 * 64 * 124 * 184 * 244 * 304 * 364 * 424 * 484 * 544 * 604 * 664 * 724 * 784 * 844 * 904 * 964 | * 1024 * 1084 * 1144 * 1204 * 1264 * 1324 * 1384 * 1444 * 1504 * 1564 * 1624 * 1684 * 1744 * 1804 * 1864 * 1924 * 1984 | * 2044 * 2104 * 2164 * 2224 * 2284 * 2344 * 2404 * 2464 * 2524 * 2584 * 2644 * 2704 * 2764 * 2824 * 2884 * 2944 | * 3004 * 3064 * 3124 * 3184 * 3244 * 3304 * 3364 |}
=== Overview === It was four years after the year of the [[Metal Rooster]], the year of the [[Revolution]] of the [[Dynasty]] changeover, and was considered the year of the ''revolutionary decree'', or the year of many upheavals, when the [[Tian]] will is renewed and heavenly commands are given to those who possess virtue ('''Kōji kaihatsu''''). In order to prevent this, the new year has often been held in this year since the Heian period in Japan. Since the Koshi Reform of 1024, the only year prior to the Meiji era (when the reign of the first emperor was abolished with the decree of Issei Ichigen) in which there was no Koshi Reform was in [[Eiroku]] 7 (1564).<ref>天野忠幸によれば、将軍足利義輝と三好長慶が改元の主導権を巡って争って軍事衝突に発展することを警戒した正親町天皇が甲子改元を見送ったとする（天野忠幸『三好一族と織田信長』（戎光祥出版、2016年） ISBN 978-4-86403-185-1 P47-48）。</ref>
Emperor [[Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] was also the son of [[Emperor Tenji|Tenchi]], who ascended to the throne after the [[Emperor Tenmu|Tenmu]] lineage was severed by the murder of his half-brother [[Emperor Kōbun|Otomo]], a prince of the Tenchi line. [[Emperor Kōnin]], and it is said that he moved the capital to [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka-kyo]] in 784, the year of the Revolution, because he was strongly aware of the change of royal line.
The [[Yellow Turban Rebellion]], which occurred in 184, the last days of the Later Han Dynasty in China and determined the dissolution of the Han Dynasty, was described as "the {{Lang|zh-hant|蒼天已死 黄天當立 歳在甲子 天下大吉}}" ("Book of the Later Han|The Later Han Dynasty"). Volume 71: Huangfu Song, Zhu Shiyi, Biography 61 [[Huangfu Song|Huang Fu Bulk]] biography<ref>{{Cite wikisource|title=後漢書/卷71|author=范曄|wslanguage=zh}}</ref>)". The slogan was.
A hot spring discovered in [[Mutsu Province|Mutsu]] (now Fukushima Prefecture) in [[Nanboku-chō period]] in 1384 was named Koshi Onsen (甲子温泉) in honor of the year Koshi.
Ito Daizo (大藏) changed his name to Ito Koshi-taro (Kashitaro/Kinetaro) in honor of the first year of [[Genji (era)|Genji]] (1864), the year of the Koshi.
The baseball stadium built in [[Taishō|Taisho]] 13 (1924) in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Nishinomiya|Nishinomiya City]] was named "Koshien Grand Sports Ground" (now [[Koshien Stadium|Hanshin Koshien Stadium]]) after the Chinese zodiac of that year. <ref>{{Cite web |date=2011-07-06 |title=旧・甲子園ホテル : とっておき旅 |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/osaka/feature/kansai1308203483172_02/news/20110706-OYT8T00734.htm |access-date=2013-12-31 |website=[[読売新聞}}</ref> It is also the name of a place in the city. This year also marks the origin of the name of the Tokyo Kosha Company.
== See also ==
